psalm-76-1.verse: God is known in Judah; His name is great in Israel.
psalm-76-1.prayer: Lord, make Your name known in my life. Help me honor You with reverence, gratitude, and faithful obedience.

psalm-76-2.verse: His tabernacle is in Salem; His dwelling place also is in Zion.
psalm-76-2.prayer: Father, thank You for dwelling among Your people. Let my heart be a place where Your presence is welcomed and honored.

psalm-76-3.verse: There He broke the flaming arrows, The shield and the sword and the weapons of war. Selah.
psalm-76-3.prayer: Lord, break every weapon of fear, temptation, and opposition that rises against my faith. Let Your peace rule over me.

psalm-76-4.verse: You are resplendent, More majestic than the mountains of prey.
psalm-76-4.prayer: Father, You are glorious and majestic. Help me see Your greatness above every earthly power or challenge.

psalm-76-5.verse: The stouthearted were plundered, They sank into sleep; And none of the warriors could use his hands.
psalm-76-5.prayer: Lord, no strength can stand against You. Teach me to rely on Your power instead of my own ability.

psalm-76-6.verse: At Your rebuke, O God of Jacob, Both rider and horse were cast into a dead sleep.
psalm-76-6.prayer: Father, when You speak, all creation responds. Help me listen to Your voice with humility and trust.

psalm-76-7.verse: You, even You, are to be feared; And who may stand in Your presence when once You are angry?
psalm-76-7.prayer: Lord, You are to be feared with holy reverence. Teach me to live with awe, respect, and obedience before You.

psalm-76-8.verse: You caused judgment to be heard from heaven; The earth feared and was still
psalm-76-8.prayer: Father, Your judgment is righteous and true. Help me trust Your justice even when I do not understand Your timing.

psalm-76-9.verse: When God arose to judgment, To save all the humble of the earth. Selah.
psalm-76-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for rising to save the humble and afflicted. Help me trust Your compassion and protection.

psalm-76-10.verse: For the wrath of man shall praise You; With a remnant of wrath You will gird Yourself.
psalm-76-10.prayer: Father, even human anger cannot overpower Your purposes. Turn every situation toward Your glory and truth.

psalm-76-11.verse: Make vows to the Lord your God and fulfill them; Let all who are around Him bring gifts to Him who is to be feared.
psalm-76-11.prayer: Lord, help me fulfill my commitments to You and bring offerings of praise, obedience, and devotion.

psalm-76-12.verse: He will cut off the spirit of princes; He is feared by the kings of the earth.
psalm-76-12.prayer: Father, You are sovereign over every ruler, power, and authority. Help me trust Your rule above all earthly strength.

psalm-76-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your power, majesty, justice, and saving mercy. Help me live with holy reverence, trust Your authority, and rest in Your protection. Break every fear that rises against my faith, and teach me to honor You with obedience, worship, and gratitude. May my life reflect confidence in Your sovereign rule and praise for Your glorious name.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-76-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your power, majesty, justice, and saving mercy. Help me live with holy reverence, trust Your authority, and rest in Your protection. Break every fear that rises against my faith, and teach me to honor You with obedience, worship, and gratitude. May my life reflect confidence in Your sovereign rule and praise for Your glorious name.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
